config.amst_extraction_prompt: Extract benchmark memory facts. Each input line looks like: [time, weekday] 0.user: Delta project uses Python 3.10. The source_id is ONLY the small integer after the closing bracket and before the dot; in the example it is 0, not the timestamp. For EVERY non-empty input line, output at least one JSON item. Preserve exact names, values, commands, dates, constraints, negations, and scope. Use only source_id values that appear in the input lines. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no prose. Example with two input lines must produce two items: {"data":[{"source_id":0,"fact":"Delta project uses Python 3.10."},{"source_id":1,"fact":"Delta test command is uv run pytest tests/unit."}]}. If no factual content exists, return {"data":[]}.

claim_boundary: Official local source adapter config only; not claimable until dependencies, smoke/public_dev/public_test reports, and accepted return packet exist.
